_case: F-24 fd ownership relocated as tier-2 evidence: two same-cwd codex TUIs where only one owns the rollout fd. The fd owner carries the rollout's fresh mtime (→ working); the fd-less twin has no rollout signal of its own (→ idle). Crucially BOTH stay alive — fd ownership decides whose telemetry is whose, it never kills a row.

cases._case: fd owner — holds the rollout, fresh mtime → working
fd-less twin — no rollout of its own, still alive → idle (never dead)
